Next step: stub invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts.

issues.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
issues.note: Senior coder now assigned (freed from #1449). PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts (Go kernel HITL events). Start with: (1) add irreversible flag to canonical action model in packages/core/src/actions.ts, (2) hook detection in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts, (3) emit ConfirmationRequired event. Open questions on headless/cron confirmation: queue vs auto-deny after timeout.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.recommendation: Carry-forward. Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Low-risk, well-precedented (same fix class as #1427 persona.env exemption). Write tool (file-level) succeeds; hook intercepts Bash writes only.
